questions.question: What is 1 COS202 – Computer Programming II Links to Online Compiler Online Java Compiler - Programiz Online Java Compiler - online editor Java Type Casting Type casting?
questions.answer: converting one data type into another

questions.question: What is In Java, there?
questions.answer: two main types of casting:  Widening Casting (automatic) - converting a smaller type to a larger type size byte -> short -> char -> int -> long -> float -> double  Narrowing Casting (manual) - converting a larger type to a smaller type size double -> float -> long -> int -> char -> short -> byte Widening Casting Widening casting is done automatically when pa ssing a smaller size type into a larger size type

questions.question: What is This works because there?
What is This?
questions.answer: required because narrowing may result in data loss (for example, dropping decimals when converting a double to an int): Example double myDouble = 9.78d; int myInt = (int) myDouble ; // Manual casting: double to int System.out.println(myDouble ); // Outputs 9.78 System.out.println(myInt); // Outputs 9 Real-Life Example Here is a real -life example of type casting
